notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 13 CVEs: CVE-2022-50228, CVE-2022-50386, CVE-2025-39730, CVE-2025-39751, CVE-2023-53297, and 8 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
